description: Manifest of production-ready agents and skills in the Catalog layer (./catalogo/)

components.name: ghl-list-ai-agents
components.description: Retrieves list of Conversation AI agents from GoHighLevel account. Primary use: agent auditing, deployment verification, and metadata collection for orchestration workflows.
components.notes: Production-ready Catálogo skill. Requires GHL_API_KEY and GHL_LOCATION_ID in .env. Zero external Python dependencies for core functionality (urllib is stdlib).

components.name: ghl-list-calendars
components.description: Retrieves list of all calendars from GoHighLevel account using API v2. Primary use: calendar discovery, availability verification, and metadata collection for scheduling automation workflows.
components.notes: Production-ready Catálogo skill. Requires GHL_API_KEY and GHL_LOCATION_ID in .env. Zero external Python dependencies (urllib is stdlib). Fully functional as of 11 marzo 2026.

metadata.notes: Fuente de verdad para componentes reutilizables listos para empaquetado. Solo componentes con status=active o status=draft pueden ser incluidos en paquetes.
